title: Custom EQ slider settings are saved and persist after reopening settings panel (Falcon device)
steps: 1. Launch the app and complete onboarding (if required).
2. Navigate to the Falcon device settings panel.
3. Locate the EQ settings section.
4. Adjust one or more EQ sliders to non-default values (e.g., Bass +3dB, Treble -2dB).
5. Click the 'Save EQ' button.
6. Confirm the save dialog by clicking 'Save' or 'Confirm'.
7. Close the settings panel.
8. Reopen the settings panel for the Falcon device.
9. Observe the EQ slider positions.
expected: The EQ sliders retain the custom values set in step 4 (e.g., Bass +3dB, Treble -2dB) after reopening the settings panel.

title: Custom EQ settings are not lost when switching away from and back to Falcon device
steps: 1. Launch the app and complete onboarding (if required).
2. Navigate to the Falcon device settings panel.
3. Adjust EQ sliders to custom values (e.g., Bass +5dB, Mid 0dB, Treble -1dB).
4. Click 'Save EQ' and confirm the dialog.
5. Navigate away from the Falcon device (e.g., switch to another device or go to the home screen).
6. Navigate back to the Falcon device settings panel.
7. Observe the EQ slider positions.
expected: The EQ sliders still display the custom values saved in step 4 after navigating away and back.

title: Save EQ confirmation dialog appears and can be dismissed via Cancel
steps: 1. Launch the app and complete onboarding (if required).
2. Navigate to the Falcon device settings panel.
3. Adjust at least one EQ slider to a non-default value.
4. Click the 'Save EQ' button.
5. Observe the confirmation dialog.
6. Click 'Cancel' or 'Dismiss' on the dialog.
7. Close the settings panel without saving again.
8. Reopen the settings panel for the Falcon device.
expected: Step 5: A confirmation dialog appears asking to save the EQ settings. Step 8: The EQ sliders have reverted to their previous saved state (or defaults if never saved), confirming that Cancel did not save the changes.

title: EQ settings persist after app restart (Falcon device)
steps: 1. Launch the app and complete onboarding (if required).
2. Navigate to the Falcon device settings panel.
3. Adjust EQ sliders to custom values (e.g., Bass +4dB, Treble +2dB).
4. Click 'Save EQ' and confirm the dialog.
5. Close the settings panel.
6. Fully close/terminate the app.
7. Relaunch the app and complete onboarding (if required).
8. Navigate to the Falcon device settings panel.
9. Observe the EQ slider positions.
expected: The EQ sliders retain the custom values saved in step 4 after the app is fully restarted.

title: Default EQ values are restored when Reset EQ is used (Falcon device)
steps: 1. Launch the app and complete onboarding (if required).
2. Navigate to the Falcon device settings panel.
3. Adjust EQ sliders to custom values (e.g., Bass +5dB, Treble -3dB).
4. Click 'Save EQ' and confirm the dialog.
5. Locate and click the 'Reset EQ' or 'Restore Defaults' button.
6. Confirm the reset dialog if prompted.
7. Observe the EQ slider positions.
8. Close and reopen the settings panel.
9. Observe the EQ slider positions again.
expected: Step 7: All EQ sliders return to their default (flat/0dB) positions. Step 9: The default positions persist after reopening the settings panel.

title: Multiple EQ sliders can be adjusted simultaneously before saving (Falcon device)
steps: 1. Launch the app and complete onboarding (if required).
2. Navigate to the Falcon device settings panel.
3. Adjust all available EQ sliders to distinct non-default values (e.g., 31Hz: +2dB, 63Hz: -1dB, 125Hz: +3dB, 250Hz: -2dB, 500Hz: +1dB, 1kHz: 0dB, 2kHz: -1dB, 4kHz: +2dB, 8kHz: -3dB, 16kHz: +1dB).
4. Click 'Save EQ' and confirm the dialog.
5. Close the settings panel.
6. Reopen the settings panel.
7. Observe all EQ slider positions.
expected: All EQ sliders retain their distinct custom values from step 3 after reopening the settings panel.
